LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_AntiPowerArmor_Sp: Trained to counter American T-51b power armor units, using specialized weapons and tactics. Experienced in urban ambushes and sabotage missions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Artillery_Crew.de: Operated heavy artillery batteries, bombarding enemy positions from afar. Skilled in teamwork, calculation, and surviving counter-battery fire in the warâ€™s fiercest battles.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Battlefield_Medic: Rushed into danger to treat wounded soldiers under fire, often improvising with limited supplies. Trained in trauma care and evacuation procedures.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_ChemicalWarfare_T: Deployed chemical agents and defended against gas attacks in the trenches. Trained in hazardous environments and emergency medical response.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Combat_Cook.descr: Prepared hot meals for troops in the field, often under bombardment. Learned to improvise with rations and keep morale high with a warm bowl of soup.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Combat_Cook.title: Combat Cook
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Conscriptee.descr: Drafted into the PLA as the war escalated, given basic training before being sent to the front. Experience marked by propaganda, fear, and the struggle to survive the American advance.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Conscriptee.title: Sino-American War Conscriptee
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Engineer.descript: Built fortifications and sabotaged enemy supply lines during the war. Specialized in explosives, field repairs, and tunnel warfare beneath the battlefields.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Engineer.title: Sino-American War Combat Engineer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Field_Engineer.de: Repaired vehicles, weapons, and communications equipment on the battlefield. Adapted quickly to changing conditions and resource shortages.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Field_Medic.descr: Provided emergency care to wounded comrades in the trenches and bombed-out cities. Trained in battlefield medicine and chemical warfare survival.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Field_Medic.title: Sino-American War Field Medic
Directed artillery and air strikes from the front lines, relaying coordinates under fire. Trained in reconnaissance, radio operation, and survival in hostile territory.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Infantry.descript: Served as a foot soldier in the Peopleâ€™s Liberation Army during the brutal Sino-American War. Fought in the frozen wastes of Alaska and the ruins of Shanghai, surviving on discipline and propaganda.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Infantry.title: Sino-American War Infantry
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Military_Police.d: Maintained order and discipline among troops, rooting out spies and enforcing martial law. Skilled in interrogation and close-quarters combat.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Officer.descripti: Led squads through the chaos of the Sino-American War, enforcing loyalty and discipline. Experienced in urban combat and countering American power armor assaults.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Officer.title: Sino-American War Officer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Psych_Warfare_Ope: Spread propaganda and misinformation to demoralize enemy troops and sway civilians. Skilled in persuasion, deception, and psychological tactics.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Radio_Operator.de: Kept units connected during the chaos of battle, relaying orders and calling for artillery strikes. Skilled in encryption and countering American electronic warfare.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Sapper.descriptio: Specialized in demolitions and mine-laying, clearing obstacles and sabotaging enemy fortifications. Courageous and skilled in explosives under fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Sapper.title: Sino-American War Sapper
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Scout.description: Operated ahead of the main force, gathering intelligence on American troop movements and power armor deployments. Trained in stealth, navigation, and survival in hostile territory.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Scout.title: Sino-American War Scout
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Stealth_Trooper.d: Elite infiltrator equipped with prototype stealth suits, trained for sabotage and assassination behind enemy lines. Feared by American GIs and legendary in the propaganda reels.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Tank_Crew.descrip: Operated and maintained tanks in the PLA armored divisions, facing American Vertibirds and power armor on the battlefield. Skilled in teamwork, mechanics, and armored warfare.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Army_Tank_Crew.title: Sino-American War Tank Crew
Helped organize air raid drills at school, guiding classmates to shelters and keeping spirits high. Developed leadership and crisis management skills.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Apartment_Helper: Helped neighbors with chores in the communal housing block, learning cooperation and responsibility. Developed practical skills and a sense of community.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Bookstore_Reader: Spent afternoons in the local bookstore, reading adventure stories and Party pamphlets. Developed a love for learning and imagination.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_City_Schoolchild: Attended crowded city schools, memorizing Party slogans and practicing duck-and-cover drills. Quick to learn and eager to please teachers.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Kitchen_Helper.d: Assisted family members in preparing meals during rationing, learning basic cooking and the importance of sharing. Developed patience and a sense of responsibility.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Market_Helper.de: Spent weekends helping family sell food at the local market, learning to count change and greet customers. Developed a strong work ethic and people skills.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Market_Runner.de: Ran errands for family and neighbors in the busy city market, learning to navigate crowds and barter for supplies. Developed resourcefulness and people skills.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Mechanic_Apprent: Helped fix bicycles and scooters in the family shop, learning the basics of tools and repairs. Developed curiosity and practical skills.
Visited the city museum with family, fascinated by ancient artifacts and war exhibits. Developed curiosity and a love for history.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Propaganda_Artis: Drew patriotic posters for school contests, inspired by Party slogans and war heroes. Developed artistic skill and a sense of national pride.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Radio_Listener.d: Spent evenings listening to state broadcasts and war news with family. Learned to follow current events and discuss them with friends.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Rooftop_Farmer.d: Helped grow beans and greens on the rooftop garden, learning about plants and teamwork. Developed patience and a love for fresh food.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Rooftop_Gardener: Helped parents tend rooftop vegetable gardens, learning patience and the basics of growing food in the city. Developed a green thumb and a love for nature.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Street_Performer: Learned to sing and dance for coins in busy city squares, entertaining neighbors and soldiers. Developed confidence and a flair for the dramatic.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Textile_Helper.d: Assisted family members in sewing uniforms and blankets, learning patience and the basics of handiwork. Developed creativity and teamwork.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Child_Young_Pioneer.de: Joined the Young Pioneers, learning Party songs, marching in parades, and practicing air raid drills. Developed discipline and pride in serving the Republic.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Agricultural_W: Tended rice paddies and vegetable fields for the collective, working long hours to feed the nation and the army. Learned resilience and the value of cooperation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Apartment_Care: Maintained communal housing blocks, fixing leaks and keeping the lights on during blackouts. Learned practical skills and the art of neighborly cooperation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Black_Market_T: Operated in the shadows, trading rationed goods and forbidden items. Learned caution, secrecy, and the art of making deals under the watchful eyes of the state.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Bookstore_Cler: Worked at a city bookstore, recommending novels and educational texts to customers. Developed strong communication skills and a love for literature.
Tended public parks and rooftop gardens, growing food and flowers for the community. Developed patience, a green thumb, and pride in beautifying the city.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Entertainer.de: Performed patriotic songs and operas for citizens and soldiers, boosting morale and spreading Party messages. Talented in music and public speaking.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Factory_Worker: Worked long shifts assembling rifles and power cells for the war effort. Learned discipline, efficiency, and the importance of loyalty to the state.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Homemaker.desc: Managed a household, raised children, and kept the family safe during air raids. Skilled in cooking, cleaning, and rationing supplies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Hospital_Nurse: Cared for wounded civilians and soldiers in crowded hospitals, working long shifts during air raids. Skilled in first aid, compassion, and crisis management.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Librarian.desc: Managed a local library, helping citizens find information and escape into stories. Developed a love for learning and a talent for organization.
Sold food and supplies in the city market, bartering with neighbors and soldiers alike. Developed strong communication skills and a knack for persuasion.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Museum_Guide.d: Led tours at the city museum, sharing stories of history and culture with visitors. Developed public speaking skills and a passion for education.
Reported on local events and war news, spreading Party-approved stories and keeping citizens informed. Skilled in writing, interviewing, and public speaking.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Party_Official: Oversaw neighborhood meetings and enforced Party policies. Skilled in persuasion, organization, and keeping the community loyal to the state.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Police.descrip: Patrolled city streets, enforcing order and rooting out dissent. Trained in investigation, negotiation, and self-defense.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Police.title: State Police Officer
Delivered letters and packages across the city, braving air raids and blackouts. Learned the value of perseverance and community connection.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_PowerPlant_Tec: Maintained the cityâ€™s reactors and generators, keeping the lights on during blackouts and air raids. Skilled in electrical repairs and crisis management.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Propaganda_Art: Created stirring posters and patriotic murals, inspiring citizens to support the war and fear the American invaders. Talented in art and persuasion.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_PublicBath_Att: Kept the cityâ€™s public baths clean and welcoming, offering comfort and community in troubled times. Learned the value of hygiene and friendly conversation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Radio_Host.des: Broadcast patriotic news and war bulletins, keeping citizens informed and motivated. Skilled in public speaking and propaganda.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Restaurant_Coo: Prepared meals for hungry workers and soldiers, making the most of rationed ingredients. Developed creativity in the kitchen and a reputation for hearty, comforting food.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Schoolchild.de: Grew up attending state-run schools, learning Party slogans and practicing air raid drills. Quick to memorize lessons and eager to please teachers.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_State_Doctor.d: Practiced medicine in a crowded city hospital, treating wounds and radiation sickness. Dedicated to public health and the Partyâ€™s ideals.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_State_Engineer: Designed and maintained infrastructure for the war effort, from power plants to bunkers. Analytical and inventive, loyal to the Partyâ€™s vision.
Taught children about science, history, and the virtues of the Peopleâ€™s Republic. Led air raid drills and encouraged vigilance against foreign spies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Street_Mechani: Repaired bicycles, scooters, and delivery trucks for neighbors and local businesses. Learned resourcefulness and the art of improvisation with limited parts.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Street_Musicia: Played patriotic songs and folk tunes in city squares, lifting spirits and spreading hope. Developed musical talent and a strong sense of community.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Street_Sweeper: Kept city streets clean and clear, even during air raid debris and ration shortages. Developed a strong work ethic and pride in public service.
Sold steamed buns and tea in the bustling city streets, trading news and rumors with customers and soldiers. Developed a sharp wit and a knack for negotiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Student.descri: Attended university, studying engineering or medicine to serve the Republic. Quick to learn, but inexperienced in the realities of war.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Student.title: State University Student
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Tailor.descrip: Sewed and mended clothes for neighbors and local shops, making do with limited materials. Developed creativity and skill in handiwork.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Tailor.title: Neighborhood Tailor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Textile_Worker: Produced uniforms and blankets for soldiers and civilians, working long hours at the loom. Learned patience, precision, and the importance of teamwork.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Theater_Perfor: Acted in patriotic plays and operas, entertaining citizens and soldiers alike. Developed a flair for drama and a talent for inspiring hope in dark times.
Operated city trams, transporting workers and families through busy streets and blackout drills. Learned punctuality, patience, and the importance of keeping the city moving.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_PRC_Citizen_Utility_Worker: Maintained power lines and water pipes in the city, keeping essential services running during air raids and blackouts. Skilled in repairs and crisis management.
